candidates.why: Clear top-line revenue line with populated values; preferred over headers and redundant total aliases.
Also a revenue total with identical values; useful as fallback if primary label is missing in some years.
Section header only, not the numeric revenue row.

variables.notes: Selected as priority list of reported revenue labels; do not sum.

candidates.why: Best direct COGS/cost of sales line; populated and preferred over broader totals/duplicates.
Equivalent total cost of revenues line with same values, but subtotal/total is less preferred than the more specific operating revenue cost line.
Excludes depreciation and is only a component, so it understates full reported cost of revenues.

variables.notes: Used the specific direct cost line rather than duplicate total rows.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and populated; per hierarchy this should be selected alone when available.
Only a component of SG&A and excludes depreciation, so less complete than the explicit SG&A row.
Too broad and includes COGS, so not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and already states it excludes R&D, so selected only this row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related but this is amortization, not current-period R&D expense, and appears below EBIT/EBITDA supplemental section.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line on the income statement. The only R&D-related line is amortization of capitalized R&D, which should not be used as XRD expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest expense line; preferred over net finance totals and likely equivalent to reported interest expense.
Also a clear interest expense line with identical values; useful fallback if the preferred label is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost component, but likely already included in total interest expense; selecting it too would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list of single interest-expense labels; later code should use first non-missing value, not sum them.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent-only equity line, which excludes minority interest and matches the BE rule.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-attributable equity line; useful fallback if primary label changes across years.
Also appears to equal parent common equity here; fallback candidate.
Equivalent common shareholders' equity line; acceptable fallback.
Same values as parent/common equity here, but less standard than attributable-to-parent equity labels.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list of parent-attributable/common equity labels to exclude minority interest from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; preferred for MIB.
Also a direct minority interest balance sheet line with same values; useful fallback.
Income statement allocation item, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet minority interest labels; do not sum.
